title: Trade Federation Regional Commander
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Regional Commander''' was the title given to officers of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] who oversaw particular areas of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] under Federation control.

The [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] officer [[Harro Ruuk]] was Regional Commander of the [[Karthakk system]] as of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], and directed Federation forces against [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] from a [[Trade Federation sensor station|sensor station]] on [[Maramere]].

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''
